# Pull Request

## What changed
<!-- Describe the feature, bug fix, documentation update, refactor, test change, release work, or operational improvement. Focus on the outcome. -->

## Why this change is needed
<!-- Link the issue, ticket, discussion, or explain the problem this PR solves. -->

## Implementation notes
<!-- Call out important design decisions, edge cases, dependencies, migrations, or follow-up work reviewers should understand. -->

## Validation
<!-- List the checks you ran and the result. If a relevant check was not run, explain why. -->

- [ ] Tests were added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] Existing tests, linting, or build checks were run where relevant.
- [ ] Manual verification was completed where relevant.

## Review checklist
- [ ] This PR targets the intended base branch.
- [ ] The change is focused and avoids unrelated refactoring.
- [ ] Backward compatibility, data migration, and deployment impact were considered.
- [ ] Screenshots, logs, API examples, or sample output are included when they help reviewers verify the change.
